title: Change board type to sharable via API
excerpt:
Hi Is it possible to change a board type to sharable, via the API. Please share a mutation example if this is possible. 
Many thanks Dan

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Is it possible to change a board type to sharable, via the API. Please share a mutation example if this is possible.
Many thanks Dan

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @DanIngham-IOI,

As of today, it is not possible to change the board type of an existing board via API.

Cheers,
Matias
